tagline: On-Demand Beauty, Delivered to Your Door

hero.headline:
Luxury Beauty That Comes
to You
hero.subheadline: Your special moment deserves flawless hair and makeup — without the stress of traveling to a salon. NOMI Beauty brings elite stylists with celebrity experience directly to your hotel room or home, so you look stunning and stay relaxed.
checkmarks: Book as easily as room service

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Expert Beauty Services<br class="hidden md:block">Delivered to Your Door
services.subtitle: From bridal glam to business-ready polish, our elite artists bring salon-quality results to wherever you are — hotel room, home, or event venue.

cards.title: Blowout & Hair Styling
cards.description: Professional blowouts and styling delivered to your hotel room or home by expertly-trained stylists with celebrity and fashion house experience.

cards.title: Makeup Application
cards.description: Flawless makeup artistry for any occasion — from business meetings to galas — applied by skilled artists who guarantee a look that lasts all day and night.

cards.title: Bridal Hair & Makeup
cards.description: Comprehensive wedding day beauty for brides and bridal parties, including trials and day-of styling. Bridal packages from $325, bridal party services from $95.

cards.title: Makeup Lessons
cards.description: Personalized one-on-one or paired lessons teaching professional techniques and product knowledge from experienced artists. Lessons for two from $300.

cards.title: Massage Services
cards.description: On-demand massage therapy delivered to your luxury hotel room, providing deep relaxation and rejuvenation during your stay. Book through your concierge.

cards.title: Special Event Styling
cards.description: Complete hair and makeup for galas, photo shoots, corporate events, and any occasion requiring a polished, camera-ready look. Group bookings welcome.

steps.title: Book Your Appointment
steps.description: Request your session through our app, website, or hotel concierge. Our AI scheduling technology, Lorelei, instantly matches you with the perfect available artist.

steps.title: Your Artist Arrives
steps.description: A vetted, elite stylist or makeup artist arrives at your hotel room or location with everything needed. No travel, no waiting — just sit back and relax.

steps.title: Step Out Stunning
steps.description: Walk out the door looking and feeling your absolute best. Whether it's your wedding day or a Tuesday meeting, you'll turn heads with confidence.

about.label: Why Clients Trust NOMI Beauty
about.headline: Not Just Beauty — An Experience Delivered to You
about.description: Founded in NYC in 2016 by Nikki Robinson, NOMI Beauty has spent a decade redefining convenience in luxury beauty. Our elite team of stylists and makeup artists — with celebrity and fashion house credentials — deliver consistent, high-quality results in your hotel room or home. Featured in Vogue and trusted by luxury hotels from Manhattan to Miami, we make booking beauty as simple as ordering room service.

features.title: Celebrity-Level Artists
features.description: Every NOMI artist is hand-selected with fashion house or celebrity experience, ensuring flawless results for every client, every time.

features.title: AI-Powered Booking
features.description: Our proprietary Lorelei technology seamlessly matches your appointment with the ideal available artist — no phone tag, no hassle.

features.title: Luxury Hotel Partnerships
features.description: Trusted by The Quin, WestHouse, The Knickerbocker, and Avalon Hotel. Book through your concierge for effortless in-room beauty.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Luxury Made Accessible.
pricing.subtitle: Bridal, event, or everyday glam — choose the service that fits your moment. No hidden fees, ever.

guarantee.headline: Our "Flawless Look" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely thrilled with your hair or makeup, your artist will adjust it on the spot until you love what you see in the mirror. We are not finished until you feel absolutely stunning — that is the NOMI Beauty promise.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.answer: For bridal and large event bookings, we recommend 2-4 weeks in advance. For hotel guests and everyday styling, same-day and next-day appointments are often available. Book through our app, website, or your hotel concierge.

faqs.question: Where do you provide services?
faqs.answer: We come to you! NOMI Beauty serves New York City (Manhattan), Miami, and partner luxury hotel locations. Whether it is your hotel room, home, or event venue, our artists arrive fully equipped.

faqs.question: What are your hours of availability?
faqs.answer: Our artists are available daily from 6:30am to 9pm. Early morning bridal calls and evening event prep are our specialty. Book your preferred time and our AI system will match you with an available artist.

faqs.question: How much do bridal services cost?
faqs.answer: Bridal packages start at $325 and include a trial and day-of service. Bridal party hair or makeup starts at $95 per person. Makeup lessons for two begin at $300. Contact us for a custom quote for your wedding party size.

faqs.question: What if I need to cancel or reschedule?
faqs.answer: We understand plans change. You can reschedule or cancel your appointment through our app or by contacting us directly. We ask for at least 24 hours notice for cancellations to ensure our artists can serve other clients.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: NOMI Beauty was the best value found for hair and makeup in NY. My whole wedding party looked amazing and they were very professional, with enough staff to complete everyone in a tight timeframe.

testimonials.name: Jessica R.
testimonials.text: Once I met Dani for makeup and Maya for hair, I knew I had found very talented artists. They were very patient in understanding the look I was going for and the results were stunning.

testimonials.name: Lauren T.
testimonials.text: I am completely obsessed with NOMI Beauty. I will definitely go back for any special event. The artists are incredible and the convenience of in-room service is unbeatable.

contact.headline:

Luxury Beauty?
contact.subtitle: Book your in-room styling session today. Our AI matches you with the perfect artist — no phone tag, no salon travel, just stunning results delivered to your door.
benefits: Matched with your ideal artist instantly
